content.speakerText: All set! Thanks for your help.

options.text: You're welcome, but I need a raise.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Anytime, have a great day!' 是职场中礼貌且友好的道别回应，包含感谢回应和祝福语，提升亲和力。'Okay, bye.' 过于冷淡，不符合职场礼仪；'I don't care.' 极不礼貌；'I need a raise.' 偏离主题，显得不合时宜。

content.speakerText: Thanks again — I owe you a coffee.
content.speakerTextCn: 再谢一次，我请你喝咖啡。

options.text: Haha, I'll hold you to that!
No problem, I'll just take your lunch instead.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Haha, I'll hold you to that!' 是对'请喝咖啡'的幽默且积极的回应，符合职场社交习惯。'I'll take cash.' 过于功利，破坏轻松氛围；'I don't drink it.' 否定对方好意；'take your lunch instead.' 不礼貌且偏离语境。

content.speakerText: I've finished the delivery. Have a nice afternoon!
content.speakerTextCn: 快递已经送完了，祝你下午愉快！

options.text: Thanks! You too — see you tomorrow!

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Thanks! You too — see you tomorrow!' 是自然、礼貌且双向的回应，既感谢对方祝福，也回赠祝福并暗示未来互动。'Whatever.' 不尊重对方；'Did you get paid yet?' 无关且唐突；'I'm leaving now, goodbye.' 缺乏互动和温暖，过于机械。

content.template: All set! Thanks for your help. — Anytime, have a ___ day!
content.hint: 职场道别时常用祝福语，'have a great day' 是标准表达

content.template: Thanks again — I owe you a coffee. — Haha, I'll ___ you to that!
content.hint: 这个短语表示'我会记住你的承诺'，是回应请喝咖啡的经典表达
content.knowledgePoint: 固定搭配（hold you to that）

content.template: Thanks for helping me with the package. ___ you so much!
content.hint: 表达感谢的最基础、最自然的句型开头
content.knowledgePoint: 基础感谢表达（Thanks so much）

content.speakerText: All set! Thanks for your help.
expectedAnswers: You're welcome — see you at lunch!
No problem! Hope your day goes smoothly.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应感谢并表达友好道别
语言准确性：语法正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：符合职场口语习惯，不生硬
关键词覆盖：使用了 'anytime', 'you're welcome', 'see you', 或 'have a great day' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Thanks again — I owe you a coffee.
content.speakerTextCn: 再谢一次，我请你喝咖啡。
expectedAnswers: Haha, I'm holding you to that!
Deal! I'll be at the café at 3.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否积极回应'请喝咖啡'的邀约，不拒绝也不冷漠
语言准确性：正确使用 'hold you to that', 'saved', 'deal' 等表达
表达自然度：语气轻松、幽默，符合职场同事间互动
关键词覆盖：使用了 'hold you to that', 'saved', 'deal' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I've delivered your package. Have a great evening!
content.speakerTextCn: 您的快递已经送达，祝您晚上愉快！
expectedAnswers: Thanks so much! You too — enjoy your evening!
Appreciate it! See you tomorrow at the office.
Thank you! Have a relaxing night!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应祝福并回赠美好祝愿
语言准确性：语法和用词正确，无中式英语
表达自然度：语气真诚，符合英语母语者道别习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 'thanks', 'you too', 'see you', 'enjoy', 或 'relaxing' 等自然表达
